name: drawer
description: Bottom-sheet drawer built on vaul. Mobile-native feel: drag-to-dismiss, snap points, body-scale-on-open. Use for quick mobile actions, filters, pickers.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback when open state changes: (open: boolean) => void

props.name: shouldScaleBackground
props.description: Scale the <body> element when the drawer opens (creates depth)

props.name: snapPoints
props.description: Array of snap positions ('40%', 400, '100%') — defines resting heights the user can snap to

props.name: activeSnapPoint
props.description: Controlled active snap point value (matches one entry in snapPoints)

props.name: closeThreshold
props.description: Fraction of height the user must drag down to close (0..1)

examples.title: Basic drawer
examples.description: Mobile-friendly bottom sheet with a quick action
examples.code: Edit profile Make changes to your profile.

ai.whenToUse: Use on mobile-first or mobile-primary UX when a native app-like bottom sheet matters. Good for filters, quick pickers, confirm-then-do flows, or anywhere a user expects drag-to-dismiss.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use on desktop-primary UIs (use Dialog or Sheet). Don't use for side navigation (use Sheet). Don't use for transient info (use Popover or Tooltip). Don't use when you must prevent dismissal — drawers invite drag-down.
commonMistakes: Forgetting DrawerTitle — vaul/Radix warn and screen readers announce an unnamed dialog
Placing long forms inside a drawer without snap points — content gets cramped
Disabling shouldScaleBackground when the background context-cue matters for UX
Wrapping DrawerContent in Portal yourself — DrawerContent already portals via DrawerPortal
ai.accessibilityNotes: vaul delegates to Radix Dialog: focus trap, Escape to close, aria-labelledby/describedby wired to DrawerTitle/Description. The top handle is decorative (aria-hidden).
